popularStory.headline: Henri II de Louvain
popularStory.description: Henri II de Louvain, dit le ceinturé, né vers 1020, enterré à Nivelles en 1078, fut comte de Louvain et de Bruxelles de 1054 à 1078. Il était fils de Lambert II Baldéric, comte de Louvain et de Bruxel …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel於1020年1月7日出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文時，他的父親Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel23歲，母親Oda de Verdun31歲。他於1062年與Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1078年10月8日在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯享年58歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel于1020年1月7日出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文时，他的父亲Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel23岁，母亲Oda de Verdun31岁。他于1062年与Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1078年10月8日在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯享年58岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hendrik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel was born on 7 January 1020, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, his father, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, was 23 and his mother, Oda de Verdun, was 31. He married Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe in 1062, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 October 1078, in Nivelles, Walloon Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 58, and was buried in Nivelles, Walloon Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel est né le 7 janvier 1020, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Oda de Verdun, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe en 1062, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1078, à Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgique, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel am 7. Januar 1020 in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel 23 und seine Mutter Oda de Verdun 31. Er hat 1062 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1078 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Nivelles, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien und wurde in Nivelles, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel è nato il il 7 gennaio 1020 nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, il suo padre, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Oda de Verdun, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe nel 1062, nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 ottobre 1078, nel Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgio, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Hendrik II van Leuven-Brusselが1020年1月7日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brusselは23歳，母Oda de Verdunは31歳であった。1062年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼでAdela van Teisterbant en de Betuweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1078年10月8日にベルギーブラバント ワロンニベレスで58歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバント ワロンニベレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel(이)가 1020년 1월 7일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Oda de Verdun(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1062년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1078년 10월 8일 벨기에 브라반트 월런 니벨레스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 월런 니벨레스에 묻혔다.

mn.7 January 1020–8 October 1078: 1020 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7–1078 оны Аравдугаар сарын 8

pt.7 January 1020–8 October 1078: 7 de janeiro de 1020–8 de outubro de 1078
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1020, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Oda de Verdun, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe em 1062, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1078, em Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel родился 7 января 1020 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Oda de Verdun, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe в 1062 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 октября 1078 г. в местности нивеллесь, брабант валлон, Бельгия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности нивеллесь, брабант валлон, Бельгия.

es.7 January 1020–8 October 1078: 7 de enero de 1020–8 de octubre de 1078
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel nació el 7 de enero de 1020, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, su papá, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Oda de Verdun, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe en 1062, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1078, en Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.
